scope.description: What to generate. 'anchors' (default) = extract anchors (locations/props) if missing, then generate character turnaround sheets + location base images (multi-angle) + key prop reference images for the active scenario. Does NOT touch shot keyframes.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. If omitted (recommended), runs on the currently active scenario in the workbench.

force.description: If true, regenerate reference images even for entities that already have one. Default false (idempotent: skips entities that already have a reference image).
